title: I Don’t Trade Manually Anymore – This Is What I Use Instead
author: Odd-East3954
selftext:
I don’t know much about trading, so instead of doing everything myself I started using copy trading through TAG Markets.

The strategy I’m following is SONIC AI on Myfxbook:

Myfxbook: [https://www.myfxbook.com/members/SonicExperts/sonic-ai/12009087](https://www.myfxbook.com/members/SonicExperts/sonic-ai/12009087)

They trade forex, and everything runs automatically, which made it a lot easier for me to get started.

So far it’s been more stable than I expected, but I’m still just testing it with a small amount.

Curious if anyone else here is doing something similar?
